title: Holy Week
location: Maó, Ciutadella, Ferreries y Es Mercadal
description: From Palm Sunday to Easter Sunday, the brotherhoods take their processions through Maó, Ciutadella, Ferreries and Es Mercadal. The main day is Good Friday, with the Holy Burial in Maó and Ciutadella (8:30 pm) and in Ferreries and Es Mercadal (9:00 pm).
